'''âs-b-sh''' ('''kasabash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:backshadow|backshadow]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-b-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:backshadow|backshadow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-b-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kasabash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisabash|thisabash]] || [[word:jisabash|jisabash]] || [[word:shisabash|shisabash]] || [[word:kisabash|kisabash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusabash|thuthusabash]] || [[word:jujusabash|jujusabash]] || [[word:shushusabash|shushusabash]] || [[word:kukusabash|kukusabash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusabash|thusabash]] || [[word:jusabash|jusabash]] || [[word:shusabash|shusabash]] || [[word:kusabash|kusabash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusabash|thusabash]] || [[word:jusabash|jusabash]] || [[word:shusabash|shusabash]] || [[word:kusabash|kusabash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesabash|thesabash]] || [[word:jesabash|jesabash]] || [[word:shesabash|shesabash]] || [[word:kesabash|kesabash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosabash|thothosabash]] || [[word:jojosabash|jojosabash]] || [[word:shoshosabash|shoshosabash]] || [[word:kokosabash|kokosabash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosabash|thosabash]] || [[word:josabash|josabash]] || [[word:shosabash|shosabash]] || [[word:kosabash|kosabash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosabash|thosabash]] || [[word:josabash|josabash]] || [[word:shosabash|shosabash]] || [[word:kosabash|kosabash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsabash|thĂŠsabash]] || [[word:jĂŠsabash|jĂŠsabash]] || [[word:shĂŠsabash|shĂŠsabash]] || [[word:kĂŠsabash|kĂŠsabash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasabash|thathasabash]] || [[word:jajasabash|jajasabash]] || [[word:shashasabash|shashasabash]] || [[word:kakasabash|kakasabash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasabash|thasabash]] || [[word:jasabash|jasabash]] || [[word:shasabash|shasabash]] || [[word:kasabash|kasabash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasabash|thasabash]] || [[word:jasabash|jasabash]] || [[word:shasabash|shasabash]] || [[word:kasabash|kasabash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasabash|shasabash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasabash|goshasabash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasabash|gokishasabash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasabashnĂŒ|shasabashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasabashnknĂŒ|goshasabashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasabashnĂŒ|gokishasabashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasabashĂ«|shasabashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasabashnkshĂ«|goshasabashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasabashĂ«|gokishasabashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasabashro|shasabashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasabashnkro|goshasabashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasabashro|gokishasabashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasabashmu|shasabashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasabashnkmu|goshasabashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasabashmu|gokishasabashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasabasher|shasabasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasabashnksher|goshasabashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasabasher|gokishasabasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasabashng|shasabashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasabashnkng|goshasabashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasabashng|gokishasabashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasabashya|shasabashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasabashnkya|goshasabashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasabashya|gokishasabashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasabashyam|shasabashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasabashnkyam|goshasabashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasabashyam|gokishasabashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasabashnĂŒshĂ«|shasabashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasabashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasabashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasabashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasabashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasabashnĂŒro|shasabashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasabashnknĂŒro|goshasabashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasabashnĂŒro|gokishasabashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasabashnĂŒmu|shasabashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasabashnknĂŒmu|goshasabashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasabashnĂŒmu|gokishasabashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasabashĂ«nĂŒ|shasabashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasabashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasabashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasabashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasabashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasabashĂ«ro|shasabashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasabashnkshĂ«ro|goshasabashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasabashĂ«ro|gokishasabashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasabashĂ«mu|shasabashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasabashnkshĂ«mu|goshasabashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasabashĂ«mu|gokishasabashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasabashronĂŒ|shasabashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasabashnkronĂŒ|goshasabashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasabashronĂŒ|gokishasabashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasabashroshĂ«|shasabashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasabashnkroshĂ«|goshasabashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasabashroshĂ«|gokishasabashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasabashromu|shasabashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasabashnkromu|goshasabashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasabashromu|gokishasabashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasabashmunĂŒ|shasabashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasabashnkmunĂŒ|goshasabashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasabashmunĂŒ|gokishasabashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasabashmushĂ«|shasabashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasabashnkmushĂ«|goshasabashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasabashmushĂ«|gokishasabashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasabashmuro|shasabashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasabashnkmuro|goshasabashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasabashmuro|gokishasabashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
